npcs.name: Elder
dialogue: The plaza is our gathering place.
Head west for homes, east for shops.

npcs.name: Neighbor
dialogue: The bakery down the road is wonderful.

npcs.name: Gardener
dialogue: Each house has its own little patch.

npcs.name: Bridge Keeper
dialogue: This bridge is the heart of town.
The river is beautiful at sunset.

npcs.name: Fisher
dialogue: The river is full of fish!

npcs.name: Jogger
dialogue: The paths are perfect for running.

npcs.name: Apprentice
dialogue: The blacksmith is a tough teacher!

npcs.name: Hermit
dialogue: I live at the edge of the south woods.
